variant: build me a complete 12-week plan covering skin, hair and gym, with a weekly table

request.message: build me a complete 12-week plan covering skin, hair and gym, with a weekly table

response_body.response:
right. you're starting fresh. here's your 12-week foundation plan, personalized to your profile (31f, intermediate training, normal skin with dark circles, wake 7am, sleep 11pm).

**the framework:**
1. **weeks 1–4**: establish baseline routines, rebuild skin barrier, start gym consistency
2. **weeks 5–8**: dial in intensity, introduce active treatments (retinoid, azelaic acid), progressive overload
3. **weeks 9–12**: optimize results, compound effects visible, maintenance + advanced protocols

**skin (dark circles + barrier health):**
start with hydration + anti-inflammatory foundation. weeks 1–2 are barrier repair only (no actives). weeks 3+ layer in azelaic acid (inflammation + pigment), then retinoid in week 5. spf every morning, non-negotiable. internal: hydration 3l/day, sleep consistency (you're already solid at 8h), zinc + collagen daily.

**hair:**
consistent routine: sulfate-free shampoo 2–3×/week, deep condition weekly. scalp massage 60 sec daily (circulation). supplement with biotin 2.5mg daily + collagen 10g daily (same as skin). weeks 1–4 baseline, weeks 5–8 add scalp treatment (niacinamide serum or salicylic acid 1–2×/week), weeks 9–12 maintenance + optional growth serum if needed.

**gym:**
3 days/week, full-body strength focus (you have no equipment, so bodyweight + resistance bands if you grab them). progressive overload every 2 weeks (more reps, slower tempo, harder variation). weeks 1–4 build movement patterns, weeks 5–8 increase volume/intensity, weeks 9–12 peak and deload.

here's the weekly breakdown:

products.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
products.description: Azelaic acid for redness, PIH, and mild rosacea — pregnancy-safe.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

products.name: Alpecin C1 Caffeine Shampoo
products.description: Caffeine shampoo — DHT-blocker pairing with minoxidil.
